backend.changelog: Co-release with CadBridge 1.8.87 - clearer status while SolidWorks is still launching (it is no longer mislabeled 'Wrong tenant' when the tenant is actually correct).

cadBridge.changelog: The CadBridge installer now installs the gateway's security certificate even when the server already uses port 80 for another service (e.g. IIS): Setup tries the gateway's HTTPS address and alternative HTTP ports automatically, so it no longer fails with a 404 during certificate install.
